source_issue.title: a view for the Foundation Sponsor content type

summary_markdown:
## What this issue is about
This issue is about creating a new view for the Foundation Sponsor content type within the Plone platform. The aim is to ensure that only certain fields are visible to users who are not logged in.

## What needs to be done
You will need to implement a view that displays specific publicly accessible fields for the Foundation Sponsor type. These fields include the title, logo, sponsor type, organization size, Plone provider status, website, Twitter account, and public notes. Fields that should remain hidden from non-logged-in users must also be addressed.

## Helpful background
Currently, some fields are unnecessary for public view and could confuse users. This enhancement improves user experience while maintaining important privacy controls. Please review which fields should be included or excluded based on the initial description and consider any necessary adjustments.

## Good first steps
1. **Familiarize yourself** with the Foundation Sponsor content type to understand its structure and current view.
2. **Review existing views** in similar content types for guidance on how to implement this enhancement.
3. **Set up a local development environment** to test your changes.
4. **Consider writing tests** to ensure the visibility of fields behaves as expected before submitting your work for review.

Feel free to ask questions if anything is unclear!
